# Plan Template

Use this template only when a plan should become a durable repo artifact.
A plan may also come from an interactive planning session.
If the plan is already clear and does not need durable persistence, move directly into task spec derivation instead of duplicating it here.
This template is a fallback for preserving a plan, not the default execution artifact.

## Problem
What problem is being solved?

## Goal
What outcome should this phase achieve?

## Non-goals
What is explicitly not part of this phase?

## Constraints
What technical, product, platform, or process constraints matter?

## Proposed Approach
What is the preferred direction for this phase?

## Risks
What could go wrong or slow this phase down?

## Phase Split
How should the broader work be split into phases or slices?

## First Slice
What is the first reviewable slice to implement?
